settings.title:
Preorder a unit,
built for you.
settings.sub: Tell us your shade, your texture, your lace. We'll hand-build a unit to spec and ship within four to six weeks.

settings.title:
From spec to
your door.
settings.intro: Every preorder is built one at a time. Tell us what you want and we'll handle the rest — no guesswork, no compromise.

settings.heading: Submit your spec
settings.body: Texture, length, lace, color, density. Fill the form or DM us a reference photo — we'll match it.

settings.heading: We confirm & quote
settings.body: Within 24 hours you'll have a confirmation, a quote, and an estimated build window. Deposit secures your slot.

settings.heading: Hand-built in-studio
settings.body: Single-donor sourcing, hand-wefting, and shade-matching by our colorists. Average build: four to six weeks.

settings.heading: Final fitting & ship
settings.body: Photographed, packaged, and shipped express. First-fit guarantee — if it's not right, we make it right.

settings.title: Built to your spec.
settings.intro: Four decisions shape your unit. Pick what you want, leave the rest to us.

settings.title: Let's build it.
settings.sub: Send your spec and we'll come back with a quote within twenty-four hours. Deposit secures your build slot.
settings.fineprint: Most builds ship within 4-6 weeks. Express options available.
